24 Apr 2017
Better Storyboard Localization in XCode with IBInspectables
How to localize Storyboards and xib files using IBInspectables and avoid endlessly generating new .String files.
14 Feb 2017
How To Always Get The Topmost View Controller The Swifty Way
Getting the currently displayed view controller is not always as easy as asking the navigation controller what it's presenting. Here is how to recurse yourself all the way to the top view controller.
31 Jan 2017
How To Implement WeChat Login In iOS Swift
If you are unable to speak Chinese, implementing WeChat login can be pretty tricky due to most of the docs being in Chinese. Here's how to do it. 加油！
